description: MRI can only serve one patient at a time
CT_SCANNER can only serve one patient at a time
CONSULTATION_ROOM can only host one case conference at a time
Referral channel from ER_DOCTOR to specialists initiates evaluations
All imaging requests go through the RADIOLOGIST (shared bottleneck)
Cross-domain findings must be explicitly shared between specialists
All medication prescriptions must pass PHARMACIST review before administration
CARDIOLOGIST and NEUROLOGIST may reach different preliminary diagnoses requiring case conference
PHARMACIST approves or flags medication interactions
ER_DOCTOR initial assessment precedes specialist referrals
Case conference required when specialists disagree before treatment plan finalization
RADIOLOGIST bottleneck: multiple specialists request imaging simultaneously, all blocked waiting for the single RADIOLOGIST
